essay_requirements.raw_text: The Requirements: 2 essays of 1-2 pages each

prompts.title: Question 1 (Required)
prompts.prompt: How does the University of Chicago, as you know it now, satisfy your desire for a particular kind of learning, community, and future? Please address with some specificity your own wishes and how they relate to UChicago.

prompts.title: Question 2: Extended Essay (Required; Choose one)
prompts.prompt: In an ideal world where inter-species telepathic communication exists, which species would you choose to have a conversation with, and what would you want to learn from them? Would you ask beavers for architectural advice? Octopuses about cognition? Pigeons about navigation? Ants about governance? Make your case—both for the species and the question.
